utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all details required: 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plans and explicit costs, plus add-ons and total monthly cost — fully specified. 2) property_coverage: provides home/contents insurance with a plan name, costs, add-ons, and total monthly cost — fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: provides travel insurance with plan name, costs, add-ons, and total monthly cost — fully specified. 4) additional_services: lists enhancement services with costs — fully specified. 5) total_budget: gives complete monthly and annual cost breakdown — fully specified. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each item named in the final coverage plan to the exact corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. For health: EliteCare Premium Plan appears under both physical and mental health with rating 10. Property: EliteHome Premium Coverage rating 10. Travel: EliteTravel Premium Plan rating 10. Add-ons/enhancements: Specialist Access rating 10, Wellness Programs (Mental Health) corresponds to Wellness Programs rating 10, Home Office Protection rating 8, Emergency Response Service rating 9, Premium Medical Network rating 10, 24/7 Travel Assistance rating 10. General services: Premium Insurance Membership rating 10, Claims Advocacy Service rating 9.
